core_principles: obs-wiki is the product, plugin id, and MCP server name; Obswiki is the plugin listing name.
Agent is the only operation entry.
Obsidian plugin is human governance, review, audit, permission, status, and connection center.
No Analyze URL/File/Capture/Context/Lint/Distill entrypoints inside Obsidian plugin.
Review approval actions are allowed inside Obsidian.
Agent Connection Center is a core Obsidian plugin view.
Client auto-configuration must be user-confirmed and must only touch the obs-wiki config block.
recommended_batches: Batch A: UI Design System + Agent Activity Dashboard
Batch C: Agent Connection Center MVP
Batch D: MCP Connection / Tool-call Audit
Batch E: MCP Tool Permission Matrix
